title: The Reflection Pattern
concept: Implementing structured loops where an agent criticizes and refines its own output recursively.

exercises.prompt: What is a loop in programming?

options.text: A method to create endless results

exercises.explain: A loop allows us to repeat actions, which is essential for creating efficient programs.

cards.title: What is the Reflection Pattern?
cards.body: The Reflection Pattern is a way for AI agents to review and improve their own work. It's like looking at yourself in a mirror to see how you can do better.

cards.title: Definition
cards.body: A Reflection Pattern in AI means using loops to let an agent check, critique, and refine its own outputs. This makes the agent smarter and more accurate.

cards.title: Example Analogy
cards.body: Think of a student writing an essay. They write a draft, read it, and then make changes. The Reflection Pattern lets AI do the same with its thoughts and outputs.

cards.title: Example in Action
cards.body: Imagine an AI that writes a story. It could first write a draft, then read it, criticize its own style, and improve it in the next round.

cards.title: Myth: AI Creates Perfect Output
cards.body: Some people think AI always gets it right the first time. The truth is, like humans, AI needs time to reflect and improve its work.

cards.title: Reflection Loop
cards.body: A loop allows for continuous improvement in AI design.

exercises.prompt: What does the Reflection Pattern help AI achieve?

options.text: It allows AI to look at its work and improve it
It makes AI faster without any errors
It enables AI to create new data without feedback
It removes the need for programming

exercises.explain: The Reflection Pattern helps AI examine and enhance its output, leading to better performance.

exercises.prompt: The Reflection Pattern means AI only produces perfect results.
exercises.explain: False, because AI needs to reflect and refine its outputs to improve them.

exercises.prompt: The Reflection Pattern is useful because it allows AI to ______ its own output.
exercises.sentence: The Reflection Pattern is useful because it allows AI to criticize its own output.
exercises.explain: Criticizing helps the AI improve its work through reflection.

exercises.prompt: Which statement about the Reflection Pattern is correct?

options.text: AI needs to reflect on its output to get better.
Reflection slows down AI's processing time, making it less efficient.
Once AI learns, it doesn't need to reflect anymore.

exercises.explain: The correct statement emphasizes the importance of reflection in improving the AI's capabilities.

exercises.prompt: Why is the Reflection Pattern important in AI design?

options.text: It allows for faster completion of tasks.
It helps AI learn and correct mistakes through output criticism.
It ensures AI runs without any programming.
It eliminates the need for data input.

exercises.explain: The Reflection Pattern is crucial because it enables AI to learn from its errors, leading to continuous improvement and more reliable outputs.
